settings.label: Site background image
settings.info: Recommended size: 2560x1440px. Leave blank to use background color.

settings.label: Background overlay opacity
settings.info: Adjusts a white overlay on top of the background for readability. 0% = image fully visible, 100% = image hidden.

settings.content: Every parameter below is a default that flows through the whole storefront. Glitch and decode colors automatically match the active section's color scheme, so picking one of the scheme-omnitask-cyan / -purple / -magenta / -pink / -green schemes is usually enough to get a tuned look on its own. Sections expose 'Apply glitch / decode to all buttons' toggles to switch the effect on without re-configuring each block.
Brings OmniTask's cyberpunk styling into the storefront. Enable per-effect or apply to every theme button at once.

settings.label: Apply neon glow to all theme buttons
settings.info: Replaces the default fill / outline buttons with the OmniTask neon look (filled for primary, outline for secondary).

settings.label: Glitch animation on every button hover/click
settings.info: Chromatic-aberration flicker on hover, harder burst on click. Skips automatically when the visitor has Reduce Motion on.

settings.label: Default neon color
settings.info: Sets --ofx-neon-rgb at the document root so any element using neon classes picks up this color by default.

settings.content: Apply effects to specific elements anywhere on the storefront via CSS selectors. JS auto-tags matching elements with the data attributes. Comma-separate multiple selectors.

settings.label: Glitch on hover — CSS selectors
settings.info: Examples: .shopify-section-template--16-image-banner .button--primary, .product-form__submit, [data-cta='hero']

settings.label: Decode on first hover — CSS selectors
settings.info: Examples: .banner__heading, h1.title, .featured-product__title

settings.label: Auto-decode H1 / H2 in main content
settings.info: Adds the decode/scramble effect to every H1 and H2 inside section blocks (skips header/footer/menus).

settings.label: Auto-decode all theme button labels
settings.info: Decodes button text on first hover. Skipped automatically when 'Reduce motion' is set in the OS.

settings.content: Defaults for every element with a glitch effect. Glitch slices and chromatic ghosts automatically match the active Shopify color scheme's primary button color, so picking a scheme is usually all the configuration a section needs.

settings.label: Glitch type — buttons
settings.info: Default effect on .button / neon button hover. Slice is OmniTask's PowerGlitch port (DOM clones cut into bands).

settings.label: Glitch type — headings
settings.info: Default for h1 / h2 / h3 with [data-fx-glitch].

settings.label: Glitch type — cards & other elements
settings.info: Catch-all default for non-button, non-heading targets (cards, icons, etc.). Box variants use drop-shadow filters instead of text-shadow so the chromatic ghosts wrap the whole rectangle.

settings.label: Duration (ms)
settings.info: Total animation length. All glitch types respect this.

settings.label: Step granularity (slice type only)
settings.info: How many discrete random slice configurations the animation cycles through. Higher = grainier / more digital.

settings.content: The settings below only apply to the Slice (PowerGlitch) type.

settings.label: Slice count
settings.info: Number of horizontal slices the button breaks into per glitch frame.

settings.label: Slice displacement
settings.info: Maximum horizontal offset (in pixels) applied to each slice per step.

settings.label: Shake the whole button while slicing
settings.info: Adds OmniTask's shake mode on top of the slice effect. Off matches the default OmniTask config.

settings.label: Glitch color source
settings.info: Default tint for glitch slices and chromatic ghosts. 'Match scheme primary button' is the recommended default — slices reuse the active section's primary button color, so each scheme automatically themes its own glitch. The named colors force a specific neon hue regardless of scheme.

settings.content: Defaults for the character-scramble decode. The 'Rotate' color mode automatically picks from the active scheme's neon palette so each section's decode glyphs match its theme.

settings.label: Duration (ms)
settings.info: Approximate total time for all characters to settle. Longer = slower decode.

settings.label: Glyph color source
settings.info: Rotate uses the active section's scheme palette automatically. Match copies the element's own rendered color (so decoded glyphs stay the button label color).

settings.label: Replay decode on every hover
settings.info: Off (default) plays the decode once per page load. On replays it whenever the cursor enters the element.

settings.content: Override the OmniTask palette to match your brand. Leave blank to keep the defaults.
